# Code Quality Rules

## When to Use

- Refactoring existing code for better structure
- Reviewing code for duplication and code smells
- Extracting functions, constants, or shared utilities
- Decomposing large files, classes, or functions
- Applying SOLID principles and design patterns
- Code review sessions focused on maintainability

## Rules

This skill bundles three rule sets. Load the specific reference when needed:

- [Anti-Duplication Rules](./references/anti-duplication.md) — DRY principles, deduplication, code reuse patterns
- [Decomposition Rules](./references/decomposition.md) — Single responsibility, function size, module boundaries
- [Extraction Rules](./references/extraction.md) — Constants, magic numbers, shared logic extraction
